rationale: Gov't Code §2001.094 governs deposition commissions in contested agency cases. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no overlap or conflict exists.
quote: On its own motion or on the written request of a party to a contested case pending before it, and on deposit of an amount that will reasonably ensure payment of the amount estimated to accrue under Section 2001.103, a state agency shall issue a commission
_note: Rule text concerns administrative deposition procedure; no bearing on homestead exemption valuation.
